title: calceolaria corymbosa subsp. corymbosa
intro: Calceolaria corymbosa subsp. corymbosa is a flowering plant species within the Calceolaria genus, commonly known as the slipper flower due to its unique shape. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, exhibiting properties such as antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, which contribute to its medicinal value. The health benefits of Calceolaria corymbosa subsp. corymbosa include relief from respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, and it has been used to treat digestive problems and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Calceolaria corymbosa subsp. corymbosa typically involve drying the leaves and flowers for use in teas or infusions.
